Description.Name: Arelle Reaches Out
Description.Details:
<color=#BFBFBF>A priority signal cuts through the bridge comms without warning. Not on the Tribe's relay nor on any channel the crew has been using.</color>

<color=#BFBFBF>Farah sits up straight, fingers already moving across her console.</color> "That's a [[DM.Factions[faction_GhostBearWatch],Watch]] military channel. Patrol-tier encryption. Nobody should be contacting us on this."

<color=#BFBFBF>The signal resolves into a short text block. No voice, no video.</color>

<color=#DFDFDF>"Commander. I know what you and your bunch have been up to, and it appals me. But I am willing to look past your transgressions if you come to your senses and join the winning side. Ours.

I am offering this opportunity one time only. One. Take it or don't."

—Star Colonel Arelle Jorgensson</color>

<color=#BFBFBF>Darius stares at the screen.</color> "She's been watching us, keeping track of us since that first conversation. I should probably not be surprised."

<color=#BFBFBF>Sumire leans forward, reading the message again.</color> "She knows we are not happy with the situation somehow. And now she's reaching out on a military line, not a personal one. That's deliberate."

<color=#BFBFBF>Farah shakes her head slowly.</color> "This channel carries targeting data and patrol orders. Sending a personal message on it means she wanted us to know she has access to Watch operational infrastructure. It's a reminder of what she controls. There is a hyperpulse link here, for a direct call with her."

<color=#BFBFBF>The cursor blinks on the response terminal.</color>

Description.Name: Reject the call invitation
Description.Details:
<color=#BFBFBF>You reach over and kill the signal. The screen goes dark.</color>

<color=#BFBFBF>Nobody speaks for a few seconds. Farah pulls her hand back from the console. Darius looks at you, datapad still in hand.</color> "Alright, Commander. Your call. I just hope you know what you're doing."

Description.Name: Accept the call invitation
Description.Details:
<color=#BFBFBF>You look at the blinking cursor for a long moment, then stand.</color>

"We're taking it. To the conference room right away, all of you."

<color=#BFBFBF>Darius opens his mouth, closes it, then grabs his datapad. Farah routes the signal to the conference terminal and follows. Yang and Sumire and quick to join along the way.</color>
